recipe.title: Easy Meatloaf
recipe.summary: This meatloaf recipe doesn't take long to make at all, and it's very good! Perfect for busy weeknights and sure to please everyone at your table.
recipe.chefsnotes: You can use crushed crackers instead of bread crumbs for added flavor and texture.
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Combine ground beef, onion, milk, bread crumbs, and egg in a large bowl, and season with salt and pepper.
Press mixture evenly into the prepared loaf pan.
Stir ketchup, brown sugar, and mustard together in a small bowl until smooth, and spread evenly over the meatloaf.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center, about 1 hour.
An instant-read thermometer inserted into the middle reads at least 160 degrees F (70 degrees C).
